title: Undopia Pride Logo
body:
![undopia-pride-logo](https://i.imgur.com/82FlpGn.png) # Undopia Pride Logo [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/undopia-pride-logo?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth&color=%231bd96a) ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undopia-pride-logo) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1030231?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=CurseForge&color=%23f16436) ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/undopia-pride-logo) [![ko-fi](https://i.imgur.com/wv1uE4k.png)](https://ko-fi.com/undugt) Pride Logo adds a rainbow main menu logo and a rainbow realms logo. Additionally, the Java Edition Label is given trans colors. ---
[![Undopia Patch Resource Pack](https://i.imgur.com/beZ50qS.png)](https://patch.undopia.net) This resource pack is part of the Undopia Patch family. It is made of these Undopia Patch Features ![3NMbPRN.png](https://i.imgur.com/3NMbPRN.png) If you want to customize any of these use the Undopia Patch Customizer.
